## What

_One or two sentences. What this PR changes._

## Why

_The problem this solves. If it closes an Issue or Discussion, link it: `Closes #123`._

## Changes

- `path/to/file.py` — what changed
- `path/to/test.py` — what changed

## Tests

- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] New or modified public behaviour has tests
- [ ] Tests cover the failure mode before the fix (red → green)

## Notes for the reviewer

_Anything non-obvious. Why this approach over the alternative. Edge cases you considered and intentionally did not handle._
